description: Article number: 24132LMGTCase style: Analogue watch with a circular case, fixed bezel with markings and a stainless steel back Dial style: White dial with grey accent, red and black markings, black hands, branding below the 12 hour markFeatures: Screw to reset the time, date display at the 3 hour markStrap style: Black, textured, leather strap with a tang clasp and two loops to hold the tail in place Water resistant up to 30 m Warranty: 1 year warranty from the date of purchase against manufacturing defects
